subject: Replace your paper waivers with a link
body:
Hi {{firstName}},

GetSolvedIt lets your participants sign their waiver before they arrive — on their phone, in under a minute. You get a signed record automatically. No paper, no clipboards, no queue at the door.

Works for surf schools, climbing gyms, yoga studios, escape rooms.

https://www.getsolvedit.com/waivers?mkt=uk&lang=en&s=em

Sara Morgan

alternatives.label: v1-founder
alternatives.subject: Still doing paper waivers on the day?
alternatives.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

I'm building a digital waiver tool for activity businesses: send a link before the session, participants sign on their phone, and you get a signed record. No printing, no clipboards.

Would this be useful to you?

https://www.getsolvedit.com/waivers?mkt=uk&lang=en&s=em

Sara Morgan

alternatives.label: v2-soft-launch
